tombstone.detail: empty-body GUI comment-row artifact; dead even in WC3
no-op stub; engine housekeeping with no LitD equivalent (tooling.md §2.5)
Go return value from Game.CreateUnit replaces the bj_lastCreatedUnit side channel
one-call position+facing combo; superseded by Unit.SetPosition(pos) + Unit.SetFacing(angle) — the two canonical setters express it without a bundling helper
position + face-toward-location combo; superseded by Unit.SetPosition(pos) + Unit.SetFacing(angle-to-target); the look-at angle is computed at the call site from the two points
render-only animation-tag toggle; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
boolexpr AND-combinator; Go closures compose with && (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
wraps a code func into a conditionfunc; a Go func(Event) bool IS the condition (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)

JASS integer->enum-handle converter (e.g. RACE_HUMAN = ConvertRace(1)); a language artifact for declaring typed constants. The Go API exposes typed enum constants directly, so the converter has no public surface (dedup §7 gameplay-irrelevant)

goMapping.goSignature: (owner Player, typ UnitType, pos Vec2, facing Angle) Unit

tombstone.detail: manual boolexpr free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
manual conditionfunc free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
manual filterfunc free; Go closures are GC-managed (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
wraps a code func into a filterfunc; a Go func(Event) bool IS the filter — WithFilter(fn) (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
type's base fly height; static counterpart to the deferred dynamic fly-height — mapping it alone is a capability-free half-feature. Deferred with the family (#367)
type's base prop window; static counterpart to the deferred dynamic prop-window. Deferred with the family (#367)
unit z (fly height); needs a per-unit climb-integrated z column the 2D sim lacks. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
prop window (translation gate angle); a behavioral movement change with no backing state. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
destructables are not modeled in the engine yet; the destructable-rally getter is deferred until the destructable subsystem lands (capability preserved, not averaged away) (#217)
int->real cast; Go uses float64(i) natively (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
int->string; Go uses strconv.Itoa/fmt (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
boolexpr NOT-combinator; Go closures use ! (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
boolexpr OR-combinator; Go closures compose with || (triggers-and-events.md, R-API-4)
render-only queued animation; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
real->int cast; Go uses int(r) natively (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
real->string; Go uses strconv.FormatFloat/fmt (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
width/precision real->string; collapses onto fmt.Sprintf (math-strings-conversion.md D2). No public surface
string->int; Go uses strconv.Atoi (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
string->real; Go uses strconv.ParseFloat (math-strings-conversion.md). No public surface
render-only animation override; render derives clips (Idle/Walk/Attack/Death) from sim state, not the reverse (R-API-6, R-AST-3). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
render-only animation override by index; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
render-only animation blend duration; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)

gradual timed turn-to-face is a real capability not yet modeled; the instant endpoint is Unit.SetFacing, but the animation-over-duration is deferred to the turn-rate order work rather than averaged away (units.md hazard: capability preserved, not collapsed)
animates z toward a target at a rate/sec; needs current+target+climb-rate state integrated each movement tick. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
sets the prop window; gates translation on facing-vs-move angle in golden-trace-sensitive movement.go. Deferred to the z/climb movement subsystem (#367)
render-only model scale; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
render-only animation playback rate; no sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
render-only vertex tint; no deterministic-sim effect (R-API-6). Deferred to a render/cinematic API (#364)
